title: Unified Opt-Outs across RCS, SMS, and MMS channels
raw_changelog: Twilio Programmable Messaging automatically unifies opt-out management across RCS, SMS, and MMS channels. When an end-user opts out on one channel, it applies to all channels. Any attempt to message an opted-out user will fail with Error 21610.
before_text:
## Opt-Out Management

Opt-outs are managed per channel:
- SMS opt-outs only affect SMS messages
- MMS opt-outs only affect MMS messages
- RCS opt-outs only affect RCS messages

Sending to an opted-out user on one channel does not prevent sending on another channel.
after_text:
## Opt-Out Management

Opt-outs are now unified across all messaging channels:
- When a user opts out on ANY channel (SMS, MMS, or RCS), all channels are blocked
- Opt-out keywords: STOP, CANCEL, UNSUBSCRIBE
- Error 21610 returned for any attempt to message an opted-out user on any channel

**This is active by default and requires no code changes to implement.**

ground_truth.breaking_reason: Behavior change: opt-outs now cascade across channels. Messages that previously succeeded may now fail with Error 21610.
ground_truth.action_required: Review messaging logic. If you rely on channel-specific opt-outs, users who opt out of SMS will now also be blocked on RCS/MMS. Update opt-out recovery flows.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Significant behavior change, active by default
